heading: Federal Employees Compensation Account
label: 1109 Federal Employees Compensation Account
text: There is hereby established in the Unemployment Trust Fund a Federal Employees Compensation Account which shall be used for the purposes specified in . For the purposes provided for in , such account shall be maintained as a separate book account.section 8509 of title 5section 1104(e) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1109, , , related to an additional credit against tax. For further details, see Prior Law note set out preceding .act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title IX, § 90949 Stat. 643section 1101 of this title
